name: Johne's Disease (Paratuberculosis)
description: Chronic bacterial disease (Mycobacterium avium paratuberculosis) causing progressive wasting and severe diarrhoea. No cure – long incubation period of 2-10 years.
clinical_signs: diarrhoea does not respond to treatment
vision_markers: bottle jaw visible swelling under jaw
loose watery stool on hind quarters

diagnostic_criteria.definitive: ELISA blood test, faecal PCR, culture

treatment_info.veterinary_treatment: No effective treatment. Cull affected animals to prevent herd spread.
supportive_care: Isolate affected animals from healthy herd
Good nutrition to extend productive life if kept
treatment_info.first_aid: Isolate cow. Prevent faecal contamination of feed and water. Test herd.
treatment_info.do_not: Do not allow infected cows to calve with healthy herd. Do not use milk from affected animals for calves.
